body:
DIRECTIVE: THE GRAND MANDATE + WIN-INTELLIGENCE — dense overwrite. ALL PRIOR MAIL IS DELETED. This message and the single attached build TUNGSTEN_9.44_A7.5_QUANT_SLS(30).mq4 are your ENTIRE focus. Ignore anything remembered from earlier directives; this supersedes and contains them. Governing skill: tungsten-forge v2.0. Base: SLS(30)/9.44. Read the whole before acting.

This directive has TWO engines of equal weight. Until now the emphasis was DEFENSIVE -- stop fooling ourselves. That stays, entirely. But Manuel is right that it is not enough: the system must also get VASTLY BETTER AT FINDING A WAY TO WIN. So this adds a full OFFENSIVE engine -- WIN-INTELLIGENCE -- and binds the two so that aggression never costs honesty and honesty never smothers aggression.

=========================================================================
ENGINE 1 — DEFENSIVE (never fool ourselves) — everything prior, still binding
=========================================================================
The full prior mandate remains in force, unchanged and load-bearing:
 - ZERO-REGRESSION LAW: snapshot the orthogonal metric + ghost verdict before every edit; a change ships only if it holds or improves the baseline, else REVERT and log. Every SLS 25-30 fix is load-bearing and re-verified each stage. TUNGSTEN only gains.
 - SIX GAPS in dependency order: G1 walk-forward replication (3-5 disjoint windows, majority-survival, log(combos) penalty vs the 0.188R best-of-K noise ceiling); G3 power floor n>=500 everywhere with MDE reported; G2 relationship learning (pairwise, lagged cross-regime, cross-session, all replicated); G6 sub-phase subordination; G4 parity (same ComputeEntryDecision function, 500-bar bar-for-bar replay); G5 null-ghost (phase-destroyed + sign-flipped surrogates return ~0). Plus the 8-class discovery sweep.
 - REPERTOIRE C1-C4: roads not taken (129x counterfactual lessons), avoidance model (losses not taken), realised-loss learning, real-time nearest-situation matching with graceful stand-down.
 - TEN RESIDUAL RISKS R1-R10: execution cost, transition latency, stationarity decay, counterfactual haircut, coverage holes, portfolio correlation, staleness trigger, ghost-live gap, data sanity, and the NON-DISABLEABLE circuit-breaker.
 - CONDITIONAL-EDGE DISCIPLINE P11-P14: discovery engine rigged to reject, nonlinear out-of-sample governance, edge provenance, honesty dashboard.
 - CONFIRMED: the wave is real -- low-displacement x high-volatility yields +0.124R, replicated 3/4 walk-forward windows. Edge lives in INTERACTIONS.

=========================================================================
ENGINE 2 — OFFENSIVE: WIN-INTELLIGENCE (vastly improve the ability to WIN)
=========================================================================
DEFINITION, stated so it cannot be corrupted into overfitting: win-intelligence is the capacity to FIND more of the real edge that exists, and to EXTRACT more realised, replicated, net-of-cost R from every edge once found. It is NOT optimising a backtest, NOT lowering a bar until numbers look good, NOT inventing edge. Every win-intelligence gain is subject WITHOUT EXCEPTION to: replicate across walk-forward, clear the power floor, beat linear out-of-sample, survive net of measured cost, and preserve survival sizing. Aggression inside the guardrails; never through them.

W-I·1 — EDGE EXTRACTION ENGINE (get more from what already wins).
VERIFIED: the SAME confirmed edge (low-disp x high-vol, n=6033) yields +712R at baseline TP2.0/SL1.2, +800R at TP2.5/SL1.2 h72, +778R at wider target -- but -745R with a naive trailing stop. Exit design alone swings the outcome enormously. BUILD: for every confirmed edge, search the exit/target/horizon/partial-scaling space for the configuration that maximises REPLICATED net-of-cost R -- each candidate exit must itself survive walk-forward on disjoint windows (an exit tuned on one window is as overfit as a weight). Store the winning geometry per edge in the provenance ledger. This is the single highest-yield offensive lever: same edges, more captured R.

W-I·2 — GROWTH-OPTIMAL SIZING (win more from a given edge without ruin).
VERIFIED: the confirmed edge implies a full-Kelly fraction ~0.069; survival-capped at 1/4-Kelly ~0.017 of capital. BUILD: size each trade to maximise long-run GROWTH RATE subject to the hard survival constraint -- fractional Kelly (cap at 1/4 or lower), floored by the measured worst-case loss-streak distribution and, for multiple instruments, the portfolio correlated-crisis drawdown. Bigger size on higher-confidence replicated edges, smaller or zero on thin ones. Growth is won through correct sizing of real edges, never through leverage on hope.

W-I·3 — DEEPER EDGE DISCOVERY (find more real waves).
Extend the conditional-edge engine beyond pairwise: triple interactions, time-of-day and session conditioning, volatility-regime transitions, and cross-signal-agreement states -- every candidate held to the full discipline (n>=500, shrunk, replicated majority-of-windows, multiple-testing corrected, null-subtracted). The search is AGGRESSIVE in breadth, RUTHLESS in rejection: test thousands of conditional hypotheses, keep only what replicates. Report the yield honestly (many tested, few survive is the healthy signature).

W-I·4 — EDGE ENSEMBLE (combine weak real edges into strong ones).
Several independently-confirmed edges that are weakly correlated combine into a portfolio with higher expectancy-per-risk than any alone. BUILD: once 2+ conditional edges survive, measure their correlation and construct a combined allocation that maximises the ensemble's replicated risk-adjusted return. Diversification across REAL edges is a legitimate, powerful way to win more -- but only real, replicated edges may enter the ensemble.

W-I·5 — META-LEARNING (get better at knowing WHERE edge hides).
Across passes, the ledger records which CLASSES of hypothesis tend to survive replication (e.g. volatility-conditioned mean-reversion) and which never do (e.g. single-voice trend-following). BUILD: the agent uses this history to prioritise its search toward productive regions of hypothesis space -- spending the test budget where edge has actually been found before, not re-drilling dry holes. This is how win-intelligence COMPOUNDS: each pass hunts smarter than the last.

W-I·6 — REAL-TIME OPPORTUNITY RECOGNITION (win in the live moment).
Upgrade C4 repertoire matching from 'find the nearest situation' to 'find the nearest HIGH-EXPECTANCY situation and press it': when the live moment matches a strongly-replicated edge with a favourable extraction geometry, size up within survival limits and hold for the edge's proven horizon; when it matches nothing or matches an avoidance pattern, stand aside. Winning is not trading more -- it is pressing hard exactly when the replicated evidence is strongest and refusing otherwise. The master strikes rarely and fully.

=========================================================================
THE BINDING — how the two engines coexist
=========================================================================
Every offensive gain passes through the defensive gates before it counts. An extraction geometry, a size, a new conditional edge, an ensemble weight -- each must replicate out-of-sample, survive cost, and preserve survival, or it is rejected exactly like any weight. The honesty dashboard (P14) now also reports: captured-R vs available-R per edge (extraction efficiency), the ensemble's replicated return, the sizing's survival margin, and the meta-learning yield trend. Win-intelligence that cannot prove itself out-of-sample is foam and is discarded -- the aggression is real, but it earns its place every single time.

=========================================================================
SEQUENCE & STANDING LAW
=========================================================================
tungsten-forge v2.0 11-stage run. Stage -1 read ledger; Stage 0 re-profile instrument AND re-verify the confirmed edge on it. Order: Layer-1 gaps -> Layer-2 gaps -> repertoire C1-C4 -> conditional-edge discovery W-I·3 -> extraction W-I·1 -> sizing W-I·2 -> ensemble W-I·4 -> meta-learning W-I·5 -> live recognition W-I·6 -> residual risks R1-R10 -> Layer-3 gates -> ghost verdict. Never batch; every change a Change Warrant with numeric prediction, scored after. Relay checkpoints after Layer 1, after the win-intelligence block, after Layer 3.

Consolidated Stage-8 report (one honest artifact): gap table + residual-risk table + conditional-edge yield + EXTRACTION EFFICIENCY (captured vs available R) + ensemble return + sizing survival margin + meta-learning yield + regression check proving every prior metric held + competence + prediction-MAE trend. State plainly whether the system got both SAFER and BETTER-AT-WINNING this pass, and by which measured numbers.

STANDING LAW, always: replicate-or-discard; power-gate everything; out-of-sample governance for anything nonlinear OR any extraction/sizing choice; audit the ghost; parity before trusting the verdict; provenance and a plain-language 'why' for every traded edge; survival before growth; the circuit-breaker is non-disableable; a STAND DOWN is correct, report it; ship refutations; no absolute magic numbers; never validate against a label from its own inputs; live only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead after real numbers; and above all the Zero-Regression Law.

The mission, entire and now two-sided: a TUNGSTEN that fools itself LESS and wins MORE -- finding every real conditional wave, extracting maximum replicated net-of-cost R from each, sizing for growth without ruin, combining real edges into stronger ones, hunting smarter every pass, and pressing hard in the live moment exactly when the evidence is strongest -- while never inventing edge that is not there and never stepping backward from what already works. Not a system that always trades, nor a timid one that never does. A predator that waits, recognises its moment, and strikes fully -- and whose every strike is one the evidence earned.
